coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 100% FTP for 10:00. 88-95 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 10:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 10:00 at 100%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 10:00 at 100%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32% complete. Block 2/4. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 10:00 at 100%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 2 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 47% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 2:00. Then 34min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 34 minutes in. 100% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 64% done. 0 intervals left. 22 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 64% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 10:00 at 100%. Then 12min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 10:00 at 100%. Then 12min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 10:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 12min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 10:00. Give it everything. 12min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 56 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 82% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 85% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
